text.message: Red I think it’s currently black
My win is hard I just have a fast early game
I’m assuming this is a city
Red doesn’t see how you’re wildly ahead
Red you should use a knight
We got a guy on 7 already
Not on seven havent used my sheep port once
I’m not going to be blocking you
Only because it negatively impacts you
You know I have a slow win
Youre at a hard 6 with 2 down devs and 3 cities
Can literally get 9 points in 1 turn
Insulting him is a great way to try and sway him
2 down devs didnt play a knight
